headlines.title: Iran Launches Missiles at Tel Aviv Suburb Killing Two with Shrapnel
headlines.summary: Iran fired missiles at Tel Aviv in retaliation for Israeli killings of Ali Larijani and a militia commander. Shrapnel killed two in a suburb while Israel struck Beirut. Israeli and Lebanese civilians affected; escalates three-week regional war risking wider conflict.

framings.angle: Confirmed Iranian retaliation for killings of Ali Larijani and militia commander
Reported two dead from Iranian missile shrapnel in Tel Aviv suburb

headlines.title: Israel Strikes Central Beirut Killing Six and Injuring 24
headlines.summary: Israeli forces hit central Beirut without warning, killing six and injuring 24. Lebanese residents affected amid ongoing exchanges with Iran. Raises escalation fears in three-week war; further retaliatory strikes likely as regional tensions mount.

framings.angle: Detailed casualties from unannounced strike on central Beirut
Noted early Wednesday airstrikes rocking Lebanese capital

headlines.title: Kenya Reports 71 Deaths from Ongoing Nationwide Floods
headlines.summary: Flood death toll rises to 71 with five more fatalities as police continue rescues. Kenyan residents nationwide affected by intensifying long rains. Matters for regional food security and humanitarian aid needs.

headlines.title: EU Offers Ukraine Funds and Aid to Repair Key Oil Pipeline
headlines.summary: EU proposes money and technical help for Ukraine to fix pipeline central to Ukraine-Hungary dispute. Aims to lift Hungary's aid veto. Affects European energy supplies and Ukraine support amid war.

headlines.title: Satellite Images Show Ablaze Ships and Damaged Base in Middle East War
headlines.summary: New satellite images reveal burning ships in Iranian port and destroyed buildings at U.S. base since February 28 war start. Highlights infrastructure toll across closed sites. Informs global assessment of conflict damage.

headlines.title: UK PM Starmer Urges Zelensky to Maintain Ukraine Focus Amid Iran War
headlines.summary: Starmer tells Zelensky international attention must stay on Ukraine despite Iran conflict during London talks. Signed drone defense pact. Ensures sustained Western aid to Ukraine against Russia.

headlines.title: Israel Allows Displaced Palestinians to Return to Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel permits Gazans to cross military zone back to northern Gaza after hostage release deadlock breaks. Over one million displaced affected. Signals potential de-escalation phase in enclave.

headlines.title: 90 Ships Including Oil Tankers Cross Strait of Hormuz Despite Iran War
headlines.summary: About 90 vessels transit Hormuz as Iran exports millions of oil barrels via dark transits. Global trade and energy markets affected. Demonstrates resilience in critical waterway amid conflict.

headlines.title: China Developer Vanke Reports Huge Loss Amid Property Crisis Spread
headlines.summary: Vanke posts massive loss signaling deepening real estate woes. Chinese economy and investors affected; raises bailout questions. Impacts global markets reliant on China property stability.

headlines.title: Pakistan Strikes Kabul Drug Center Killing Dozens Afghanistan Vows Retaliation
headlines.summary: Pakistani airstrike hit Kabul rehabilitation facility killing dozens possibly hundreds. Afghan civilians affected; government promises retaliation risking bilateral escalation. Matters for South Asia stability.
headlines.previousContext: Afghanistan vows retaliation; toll updated to dozens with hundreds feared per survivors

framings.angle: Reported dozens dead in drug rehab facility strike
Survivor describes strike during dinner at rehab center

headlines.title: Boko Haram Suicide Bombers Kill 23 at Maiduguri Hospital and Markets
headlines.summary: Insurgents hit teaching hospital and two markets in Borno State city. 23 dead affect Nigerian civilians; U.S. aid continues. Prolongs instability in northeast Nigeria.
headlines.previousContext: Confirmed 23 deaths in three specific Maiduguri locations

headlines.title: NATO Deploys First Response After Second Baltic Sea Cable Severed
headlines.summary: Alliance coordinates response to suspected sabotage campaign targeting infrastructure. Baltic region security affected. Heightens NATO vigilance against hybrid threats.
headlines.previousContext: Another cable severed prompting initial coordinated NATO action
